name: com.nsaintl.sven
description: SVEN is an Unity package that allows to semantize a virtual environment, i.e., to add semantic annotations to a virtual environment, to log user interactions, and to replay them.

samples.description: A simple example of how to record a virtual environment.
A simple example of how to replay a virtual environment.

samples.displayName: Demo for ISWC of Semantized Virtual ENvironment
samples.description: A use case of the SVEN package for the ISWC 2025 conference.
